nuget.description: ignorePaths in the root does not work due to higher-precedence built-in counter-intuitive nuget-specifc defaults

packageRules.description: Group MSTest dependencies into a single PR
Group Coverlet dependencies into a single PR
Group protobuf packages together - Grpc.Tools bundles protoc which must be compatible with the Google.Protobuf runtime
Do not update Build dependency. It provides backward compatibility with MsBuild 14+
Do not update FluentAssertions above v7 due to license change
